words.exampleBs: Arapska kultura je bogata i raznolika.
words.exampleEn: Arab culture is rich and diverse.

words.exampleBs: Zajedničko društvo uvijek uspijeva.
words.exampleEn: A cooperative society always succeeds.

words.exampleBs: Voli slušati mirnu muziku.
words.exampleEn: She loves listening to calm music.

words.exampleBs: Okačio je lijepu sliku na zid.
words.exampleEn: He hung a beautiful painting on the wall.

words.exampleBs: Arapska poezija spada u najstarije književnosti.
words.exampleEn: Arabic poetry is among the most ancient literatures.

words.exampleBs: Sinoć su otišli u pozorište.
words.exampleEn: They went to the theatre yesterday evening.

words.exampleArabic: يُشَاهِدُ الْأَفْلَامَ فِي السِّينِمَا كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki petak gleda filmove u bioskopu.
words.exampleEn: He watches films at the cinema every Friday.

words.exampleBs: Proučava klasičnu arapsku književnost.
words.exampleEn: He studies classical Arabic literature.

words.exampleArabic: الرَّقْصُ الشَّعْبِيُّ جُزْءٌ مِنَ الْمُوَرَوثِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Narodni ples je dio kulturne baštine.
words.exampleEn: Folk dance is part of the cultural heritage.

words.exampleBs: Porodične tradicije su važne za novu generaciju.
words.exampleEn: Family traditions are important for the new generation.

words.exampleBs: Kulturni festival se održava svake godine.
words.exampleEn: The cultural festival is held every year.

words.exampleArabic: الضِّيَافَةُ عَادَةٌ مُتَجَذِّرَةٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Gostoprimstvo je duboko ukorijenjen običaj u arapskoj kulturi.
words.exampleEn: Hospitality is a deeply rooted custom in Arab culture.

words.exampleBs: Kulturnu baštinu treba čuvati.
words.exampleEn: Cultural heritage must be preserved.

words.exampleBs: Posjetio je nacionalni muzej s porodicom.
words.exampleEn: He visited the national museum with his family.

words.exampleBs: Prisustvovala je izložbi likovnih umjetnosti.
words.exampleEn: She attended the fine arts exhibition.

words.exampleBs: Stari kvart je pun istorije.
words.exampleEn: The old neighborhood is full of history.

words.exampleArabic: كُلُّ جِيلٍ يُوَرِّثُ ثَقَافَتَهُ لِلْجِيلِ التَّالِي.
words.exampleBs: Svaka generacija prenosi svoju kulturu sljedećoj.
words.exampleEn: Every generation passes its culture to the next.

words.exampleBs: Mladi su budućnost naroda.
words.exampleEn: The youth are the future of the nation.

words.exampleBs: Starije ljude treba poštovati i cijeniti.
words.exampleEn: The elderly must be respected and appreciated.

words.exampleBs: Islamska umjetnost poznata je po veličanstvenim ukrasima.
words.exampleEn: Islamic art is famous for its magnificent ornaments.

words.exampleBs: Pročitala je roman za sedmicu dana.
words.exampleEn: She read the novel in one week.

words.exampleArabic: اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مِنْ أَقْدَمِ اللُّغَاتِ الْحَيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Arapski jezik je jedan od najstarijih živih jezika.
words.exampleEn: Arabic is one of the oldest living languages.

words.exampleBs: Porodica je proslavila rođendan.
words.exampleEn: The family celebrated the birthday.

words.exampleBs: Prisustvovala je međunarodnom muzičkom koncertu.
words.exampleEn: She attended the international music concert.

words.exampleBs: Posjetio je istorske znamenitosti u gradu.
words.exampleEn: He visited the historical landmarks in the city.

words.exampleBs: Uživao je u gledanju pozorišne predstave.
words.exampleEn: He enjoyed watching the theatre performance.

words.exampleBs: Svake sedmice čita novu knjigu.
words.exampleEn: She reads a new book every week.

words.exampleBs: Slika prirodne pejzaže s vještinom.
words.exampleEn: He paints natural landscapes skillfully.

words.exampleBs: Pjevala je narodne pjesme na proslavi.
words.exampleEn: She sang traditional songs at the celebration.

words.exampleBs: Narod čuva svoju kulturnu baštinu.
words.exampleEn: The people preserve their cultural heritage.

words.exampleBs: Arapska kultura se proširila po cijelom svijetu.
words.exampleEn: Arab culture spread throughout the world.

words.exampleBs: Sudjelovala je u kulturnom festivalu.
words.exampleEn: She participated in the cultural festival.

words.exampleBs: Slikar je bio kreativan u svojoj novoj slici.
words.exampleEn: The painter was creative in his new painting.

words.exampleBs: Naučio je svirati oud u djetinjstvu.
words.exampleEn: He learned to play the oud in his childhood.

words.exampleBs: Na praznike nosi tradicionalnu nošnju.
words.exampleEn: She wears the traditional dress on holidays.

words.exampleBs: Voli savremenu umjetnost i moderni dizajn.
words.exampleEn: She loves contemporary arts and modern design.

words.exampleArabic: الزَّجَلُ شَكْلٌ مِنْ أَشْكَالِ الشِّعْرِ الشَّعْبِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Zajedžal je oblik narodne poezije.
words.exampleEn: Zajal is a form of folk poetry.

words.exampleBs: Posjeduje divnu umjetničku darovitost.
words.exampleEn: She has a wonderful artistic talent.

words.exampleBs: Kulturni program prikazuje lokalnu baštinu.
words.exampleEn: The cultural programme showcases local heritage.

words.exampleBs: Čovjek je po prirodi društveno biće.
words.exampleEn: A human being is social by nature.

words.exampleBs: Arapska kultura je raznolika i bogata.
words.exampleEn: Arab culture is diverse and rich.

words.exampleArabic: يُفَضِّلُ الطَّعَامَ الْأَصِيلَ عَلَى الْأَطْبَاقِ الْمُعَدَّلَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Preferira autentičnu hranu nad modificiranim jelima.
words.exampleEn: He prefers authentic food over modified dishes.

words.exampleBs: Arapski civilizacijski doprinos je veoma veliki.
words.exampleEn: The Arab civilizational contribution is very great.

words.exampleBs: Prisustvovao je muzičkom koncertu s prijateljima.
words.exampleEn: He attended the music concert with his friends.

words.exampleArabic: تَبَادُلُ الثَّقَافَاتِ يُعَزِّزُ التَّفَاهُمَ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ.
words.exampleBs: Kulturna razmjena jača razumijevanje između naroda.
words.exampleEn: Cultural exchange strengthens understanding between peoples.

words.exampleBs: Kulturni identitet razlikuje svaki narod.
words.exampleEn: Cultural identity distinguishes every people.

words.exampleArabic: تُنْقَلُ الْعَادَاتُ مِنَ الْجِيلِ إِلَى الْجِيلِ.
words.exampleBs: Običaji se prenose s generacije na generaciju.
words.exampleEn: Customs are passed from generation to generation.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ الْجَدُّ يَحْكِي قِصَصًا شَعْبِيَّةً لِلْأَطْفَالِ.
words.exampleBs: Djed je djeci pričao narodne priče.
words.exampleEn: The grandfather used to tell folk stories to the children.
